statement: In every magma, Equation 1390 (`x = y * (((z * z) * y) * w)`) implies Equation 1130 (`x = y * ((y * (z * x)) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0211
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z z) y) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op z x)) y))
